rationale_source: F1.LA very-large amount per Layer 3 #18 recommended-default (a): very-large (>$5M) flag-for-review at admin

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Corporate refi $12M against $20M property. Per Layer 3 #18 (a): >$5M warrants flag-for-review but not reject. F1.LA accepts value; admin flagged.

very_large_amount_flag.rationale: Layer 3 #18 (a) >$5M threshold triggers admin review flag.

workflow_state.rationale: Standard; admin flag in Risk Factors.

layer3_pending_decisions.phase5_placeholder: spec assumes $5M flag-for-review threshold per Layer 3 #18 (a)
